_provenance.captured_against: synthetic / hand-authored to match the schema we parse
_provenance.note: The Client Portal returns each balance field as a {"amount": float, "currency": str, ...} dict. The IBKR adapter's get_balance() looks up the field by lowercased Apex-side key (netliquidation, equitywithloanvalue, totalcashvalue, availablefunds), then drills into the .amount sub-key. M4 closure (v0.1.68) -- this fixture pins that schema so a future Client Portal change that drops the .amount nesting (or renames the top-level key) surfaces as a fixture-replay test failure rather than a silent runtime regression.
